title: AgentEvaluationInputSchema
description: Schema for agent task evaluation input test cases.

dataset_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation dataset.

query_id.description: Unique identifier for the test case query.

task_instruction.description: The prompt/task instruction to be sent to the agent.

expected_tools.description: List of tools that the agent is expected to invoke during execution.

reference_answer.description: The ground truth or reference answer for the task.
